pages.raw_text:
Congressman Cushman has again
offered a prize Of 300 TO be given
TO the best essay writer In the sew
enth or eighth grades in the states
schools. This year the subject chosen
Is 1.-The Expedition Of Lewis and
Clarke" Last year the subject was
"The State OF Washington" and the
prize was won by a Walla Walla boy


in the seventh grade. Historical ac-
curacy. literary ability and grammar
are the features which decide the con-
test. All Of the children In these
two grades are entitled to write an
essay In school and from those sub
United the teacher chooses the one
she deems best and submits 1t to the
county superintendent. From those
sent to him the superintendent sends
the best two to the state board. This
board finally decides from the papers
sent In to whom the prize Is to be
